messages.content: ok so im super frustrated. paid for remote start last fri, works on the website i checked, but my phone app just wont show it. tried reinstalling. weird right
remote climate spins forever then says timed out. fwiw the car lives in our condo's level B3 parking, barely any bars down there. subscription is paid up
i bought the touring tier for my crv (its a 2025, im out in seattle) and the app STILL nags me to subscribe every time i open it. i already paid you guys??
nothing works. i paid. please just fix it. i dont know what else to tell you
keep getting kicked out, says error 403 whenever i tap the remote features. logged in fine otherwise
had it working tuesday, gone wednesday, back thursday after i logged out and in. its on and off, drives me nuts
car's been sitting in the airport garage since i flew out a week ago. now remote lock wont respond at all, just hangs. it says active in the app though
so i have a civic, canada, and i went for the touring plan. money came out of my account. app acts like i never subscribed. been days
my subscription is broken somehow, can you look into it? account number is on file
the feature shows up green/active on the web portal but the hondalink app says i need to buy it. confusing. paid 2 days ago
vehicle finder times out every single time. truck hasnt moved from the underground lot all week. signal is probably trash there
i want a refund honestly, this whole thing is a mess and ive been charged twice maybe
remote start = paid, confirmed on my receipt. app keeps asking me to subscribe again. its a premium plan on a limited trim if that matters
app crashes the second i open the remote tab. cant even get to the feature
everything looked fine then the climate control feature just vanished from the app. comes back sometimes. account looks normal to me
parked in a basement garage for my whole work trip, ~8 days. commands just spin. subscription active per the app
idk man it just doesnt do anything when i press the buttons
paid for elite on my cr-v out west (oregon) wait no i think i picked touring. anyway it wont activate, keeps prompting purchase
the web dashboard clearly shows my plan active. the app on my pixel does not. logging in again helps for like a minute
remote engine start has been timing out for days. car is garaged underground at work and i havent driven it. shows active though so i'm confused
